title: Scorpion scorpion_exo_1400_air_hi-viz-yellow

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner
specs.strap_type: Quick-Release Magnetic Buckle with YKK Hardware

technical_analysis: The scorpion_exo_1400_air utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber weave architecture that significantly reduces mass without compromising structural integrity, achieving a weight of just 1280 grams while maintaining ECE 22.06 compliance. The internal EPS liner features a multi-density foam configuration designed to dissipate kinetic energy across varying impact vectors, ensuring optimal protection for the rider's skull and face. Furthermore, the aerodynamic shell geometry is engineered to minimize turbulent airflow, reducing drag coefficients at high speeds and enhancing stability during aggressive cornering maneuvers.
marketing_description: Dominate the track with the Scorpion EXO-1400 Air in striking Hi-Viz Yellow, a helmet that marries cutting-edge carbon fiber technology with uncompromising safety standards. Designed for the serious rider who demands performance, this full-face model offers an ultra-lightweight experience that feels like wearing nothing but air, allowing you to push your limits with confidence and precision.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Scorpion EXO-1400 Air Hi-Viz Yellow: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face helmet featuring ECE 22.06 certification, superior ventilation, and advanced aerodynamics for ultimate track performance.
